authors: Sinclair NC, McDermott HJ, Bulluss KJ, Fallon JB, Perera T, Xu SS, Brown P, Thevathasan W
title: Subthalamic Nucleus Deep Brain Stimulation Evokes Resonant Neural Activity
study_question: Can STN-DBS evoke a focal resonant neural biomarker linked to optimal clinical benefit?
population_assessed: 14 Parkinson disease and 5 essential tremor patients undergoing awake DBS implantation
outcome_measures: ERNA amplitude, electrode location, UPDRS III items 20-26 improvement
inclusion_criteria: Patients undergoing awake DBS implantation for Parkinson disease or essential tremor
answer_to_study_question: STN-DBS evoked focal ERNA, strongest dorsally, associated with better clinical improvement.
